content:
- Restore live Rizzoma stack, capture topic screenshots, and sync docs
  - Docker Desktop WSL integration re-enabled; verified docker access and started couchdb + redis
  - Patched src/server/app.ts fallback route so the current Express/router stack boots locally again
  - Ran live Playwright login/topic verification with FEAT_ALL-backed dev stack
  - Saved real app artifacts under /mnt/c/Rizzoma/screenshots/260329-live/, including blb-study-topic-root.png
  - Updated docs/HANDOFF.md, docs/RESTART.md, RESTORE_POINT.md, and added docs/worklog-260329.md
  - Next step: fix PollGadget parse/render regression and rerun focused verification
